ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2018 Continued To Mar-20-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff'S Notice And Motion To Transfer Action For Conslidation
Off Calendar Dec-11-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Vivian Lerche of the law offices of Vivian Leung Lerche (415-680-5731) appears as specially-appearing counsel for defendant/non-opposing party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The cause is submitted without argument. The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF FRAN CARTER Motion To Transfer Action For Consolidation is granted in part. No opposition filed. The lawsuit will be transferred to Alameda County and plaintiff is required to pay all transfer costs. The decision whether or not to consolidate this case with another case after it is transferred to Alameda County will be made by the Alameda Superior Court. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR No. 11185, e-mail: adelgado@sftc.org (L&M302)
